---
title: "Synthetic RWE HPV Vaccine-Effectiveness Study"
subtitle: "Cohort attrition · KM curve · VE estimate · registry QC catch"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
---

<!--
  Quarto dashboard — one-page summary of the pipeline outputs.
  Reads result artifacts written by R/04_survival_analysis.R and R/05_qc_checks.R.
  Status: SCAFFOLD — section outline only; chunks to be filled in.
-->

## Study at a glance

_Placeholder — objective, design, and headline VE (see docs/protocol.md)._

## Cohort attrition

_Placeholder — feasibility / attrition table (sql/feasibility_counts.sql)._

## Survival analysis

_Placeholder — Kaplan-Meier curve, incidence rates, adjusted Cox → VE._

## Data-quality catch

_Placeholder — administrations-over-time-by-product plot showing the implausible
registry doses (CVX × date vs. availability window), flagged and quantified._
